methods.description: Process for preparing the working electrode by mixing active materials with binders and applying them to a current collector.

steps.description: Mix 70 wt% active materials (diatomite-like KFeS2), 20 wt% acetylene black, and 10 wt% polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) in N-methyl-2-pyrrolidone (NMP).
steps.searchable_summary: Mix active materials with binders in NMP

steps.description: Spread the slurry onto a foam nickel current collector (1 × 1 cm2).
steps.searchable_summary: Apply slurry to nickel current collector

steps.description: Heat the electrode to 120°C for 12 hours to evaporate the solvent.
Uniaxially press the electrode under 10 MPa.

methods.description: Evaluation of the capacitive performance of the prepared electrode using various electrochemical techniques.

steps.description: Use a three-electrode configuration to evaluate the capacitive performance of the electrode materials.
steps.searchable_summary: Set up three-electrode system for performance evaluation

steps.description: Perform cyclic voltammetry (CV) with scan rates of 10, 20, 40, 50, 80, and 100 mV s−1.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct cyclic voltammetry at specified scan rates

steps.description: Perform galvanostatic charging/discharging (GCD) at constant current densities of 1, 2, 4, 5, 8, and 10 A g−1.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct GCD at specified current densities

steps.description: Conduct electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) in the frequency range of 100 kHz to 0.01 Hz with a perturbation amplitude of 5 mV.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform EIS over specified frequency range
